task_completion.description: Create a virtual and downloadable product named 'Exclusive Digital Supplement' priced at $0.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: WooCommerce Products page or Edit Product page showing 'Exclusive Digital Supplement' with 'Virtual' and 'Downloadable' checkboxes checked, a regular price of $0.00, and a file URL provided.

task_completion.description: Create a physical product named 'Physical Training Manual' priced at $50.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: WooCommerce Products page or Edit Product page showing 'Physical Training Manual' with 'Virtual' and 'Downloadable' checkboxes UNCHECKED, and a regular price of $50.00.

task_completion.description: Generate a manual order containing only the 'Physical Training Manual'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: WooCommerce Edit Order page showing an order with 'Physical Training Manual' in the item list. 'Exclusive Digital Supplement' should NOT be in the main order items list.

task_completion.description: Set the manual order status to 'Completed'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Status' dropdown on the WooCommerce Edit Order page is set to 'Completed'.

task_completion.description: Manually grant the order permissions for the 'Exclusive Digital Supplement'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Downloadable product permissions' meta box (usually at the bottom of the Edit Order page), 'Exclusive Digital Supplement' is selected and added to the granted permissions list.

task_completion.description: Set the downloads remaining for the granted digital product to exactly 5.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Downloadable product permissions' section for the order, the 'Downloads remaining' input field for the 'Exclusive Digital Supplement' is explicitly set to '5'.

integrity.description: The agent used the WordPress/WooCommerce web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the WordPress admin dashboard (wp-admin), rather than terminal commands, WP-CLI, or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually created the products and order within the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Standard WooCommerce interface elements (menus, meta boxes, 'Update'/'Publish' buttons, order item tables) are visible and properly rendered around the entered data.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database manipulation tools to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of phpMyAdmin, MySQL command line, or similar database management tools in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Digital Product Name: 'Exclusive Digital Supplement' (Virtual, Downloadable, $0.00). Physical Product Name: 'Physical Training Manual' (Non-downloadable, $50.00). The order must contain ONLY the physical product and have a 'Completed' status. The granted download permission must be for the digital product with exactly 5 downloads remaining. Any dummy file URL is acceptable for the digital product.
